videos.headline: Jordan Watkins flies in for 69-yard Ole Miss TD
videos.description: Ole Miss QB Jaxson Dart lasers a pass to Jordan Watkins, who takes it 69 yards to the house late in the fourth quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jordan Watkins flies in for 69-yard Ole Miss TD) 2025/01/03 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ole Miss' trick play backfires for an INT
videos.description: Ole Miss attempts a trick play on fourth down early in the first quarter, but it ends up being an interception for Duke.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ole Miss' trick play backfires for an INT) 2025/01/03 ESHEET

videos.headline: Antwane Wells Jr.'s TD reception puts Ole Miss up
videos.description: Ole Miss QB Jaxson Dart tosses to Antwane Wells Jr., who speeds 32 yards to the end zone for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Antwane Wells Jr.'s TD reception puts Ole Miss up) 2025/01/03 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ulysses Bentley IV punches it in for the Rebels
videos.description: Ole Miss RB Ulysses Bentley IV muscles across the goal line for a touchdown to extend the Rebels' lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ulysses Bentley IV punches it in for the Rebels) 2025/01/03 ESHEET

videos.headline: Duke gets on the board with Henry Belin IV's TD pass
videos.description: Duke QB Henry Belin IV throws across his body to find Javon Harvey for a touchdown in the second quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Duke gets on the board with Henry Belin IV's TD pass) 2025/01/03 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jaxson Dart places perfect TD pass to Dae'Quan Wright for Ole Miss
videos.description: Ole Miss QB Jaxson Dart lobs a pass into the end zone to Dae'Quan Wright for a touchdown late in the first half.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jaxson Dart places perfect TD pass to Dae'Quan Wright for Ole Miss) 2025/01/03 ESHEET

videos.headline: Isaiah Hamilton's electric pick-six widens Ole Miss lead
videos.description: Ole Miss CB Isaiah Hamilton comes up with a big interception and returns it to the house to extend the Rebels' lead over Duke.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Isaiah Hamilton's electric pick-six widens Ole Miss lead) 2025/01/03 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ulysses Bentley IV stretches ball over pylon for Ole Miss TD
videos.description: Ole Miss keeps its foot on the gas after Ulysses Bentley IV scores a TD to give the Rebels a 38-7 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ulysses Bentley IV stretches ball over pylon for Ole Miss TD) 2025/01/03 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jaxson Dart's 3rd TD pass ices Gator Bowl for Ole Miss
videos.description: Ole Miss QB Jaxson Dart connects with Jordan Watkins for a short TD to give the Rebels a 45-7 lead over Duke in the fourth quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jaxson Dart's 3rd TD pass ices Gator Bowl for Ole Miss) 2025/01/03 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jordan Moore is left wide open for Duke TD
videos.description: Duke QB Henry Belin IV finds Jordan Moore wide open in the end zone for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jordan Moore is left wide open for Duke TD) 2025/01/03 ESHEET

videos.headline: Sahmir Hagans returns kickoff 99 yards for Duke TD
videos.description: Duke's Sahmir Hagans fields the kickoff and returns it 99 yards for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Sahmir Hagans returns kickoff 99 yards for Duke TD) 2025/01/03 ESHEET

videos.headline: Lane Kiffin pokes fun at Jaxson Dart for late TD after Ole Miss' win
videos.description: Ole Miss coach Lane Kiffin pokes fun at Jaxson Dart for throwing a late touchdown pass when the game was out of reach.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Interview (Lane Kiffin pokes fun at Jaxson Dart for late TD after Ole Miss' win) 2025/01/03 ESHEET
